TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wiy Cuan Simpo == Wiy Cuan , Paylenwayfan Sinkiwkay Simpu, mararid ko pisinting i Falangaw no Posong. Kasofoc Wiy Cuan Simpu, I 1931 miheca 6 folad 26 romi'ad masofoc i Switzerland, i 1925 miheca micomod i Paylenkay itiya, i 1958 miheca mapatireng malaSimpu. I 1963 miheca, ci Wiy Cuan Simpu aci Miaw Kanceng Simpu (Auf der Maur Hansj枚rg) nai Marseille minato mikalic to tamina tangasa i Kilong minato, ta tayra i Posong misinting. Ci Wiy Cuan Simpu tayra i Kakawasan patenak, minanam to nai Kikihar mipatenakay ci Po Pisin Simpu (Alios Burke, SMB) to no Kaping a sowal. Ikor, maocor ci Wiy Cuan Simpu tayra i niyaro' no Falangaw. Kaitiraan ningra i, misa'icel to no niyaro'ay pipatenak, saan mipatireng to no Payrang a sowal ko pinanam to Fangcalay cudad, mirina' to no Payrang a sowal to "sapililic ato ca'of", "pa'aliwacan sasa'osien tilid" a tilidan . I 1965 miheca, Yisokay mapili' ci Du Hua Simpu patayra i Bangkok, Thailand minanam to no Kociwsya sapipatireng, nanoyaan madadoedo ito ko Taywan mipatireng to Kociwsya . Ci Wiy Cuan Simpu misa'icel to pipatireng to Kociwsya a onto, i 1987 miheca patireng to Kisan Kociwsya . Nanoyaan minanam to ko yincumin a mina'ang to payso, macakat mafalic ko kicay, a caay to patangic mipa'aca to wawa to fafahiyan . I 2003 miheca 10 folad 18 romi'ad, Paylenkiwkay itira i pitilidan no Posong midemak to 50 mihecaan, ira ko Siencang ci Xu Qingyuan makilac to patamohong nga'ayay finawlan no Posong ci Wiy Cuan, Wu Ruosi, Ke De, Yu Huilin, Li Huairen, Just a enemay Simpu ato ci Ou Siding, Fu Yi, Siy Hongdao, Lin Sirou sasepatay Siwsi . Toya mihecaan tangasa 2008 mihecaan, ci Wiy Cuan Simpu tono matoro' no Sokay no Switzerland Paylenkay Fafa'eday pikaykian ato Switzerland sa'etal kakeridan, orasaka i 2008 miheca ci Wiy Cuan Simpu tayra i Switzerland, halafinay romi'ad itini i Taywan . O sapilongoc minokay tayni Taywan ni Wiy Cuan Simpu, ira ko mata'elifay to 600 salakaka pangangan patayra to tilid i Switzerland, orasaka i 2008 miheca malepon ko lekadan no kala Fafa'eday pikaykian ni Wiy Cuan Simpu . I 2015 miheca 5 folad 11 romi'ad, o kakeridan no Sencefo no Taywan ci Lin Zhengze tayra sa i Posong pakaolah pakompay 13 tamdaw tadamaanay tamdaw, o sakakaay to 84 ko miheca ni Wiy Cuan Simpu . 'Ayaw i 1979 mihecaan itiya, ci Wiy Cuan Simpu itira i Lotong Senmo isingan makinsa ni Fan Fenglong ising ci adada to kahetingay tatiihay piras. I 2015 miheca 8 folad, ci Wiy Cuan Simpu malaliyaw haca malinah tayra tayra i fala' ko adada, ikor oya misawaday a 'aisidan ci Zhang Jiaxiong ko marariday mipatihi patayra i He Xin isingan no Taypi a paising. Itiya i 2017 miheca 8 folad 3 romi'ad mapatodong no Sakakaay midemakay to laloma'an (Nicenpo) to kaingangan. I 2020 miheca 3 folad 16 romi'ad, ikor no pipakinsi i He Xin isingan, o paliding to ko sakaromakat ni Wiy Cuan Simpu, sanoya sato paherek ko tayal ningra i kiwkay. Itiya i 2022 miheca 2 folad 13 romi'ad herek no lahok 1 ko widi, itira i kamaro'an no Paylenwayfan Sinkiwkay siwkay a miliyas to hekal a mapatay, matadem itira i Tinsokiw no Piwho a pitademan matadem . Tanengnengan 2. ).
S.PHON: == wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u == wij 师o~u~uan , paj删蓹nwajfan sinkiwkaj simpo~u~u, marari涩~僧 ko~u pisinti艐 i fa删a艐aw no~u po~uso~u艐. kaso~ufo~u师 wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u, i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 maso~ufo~u师 i swit*蓹r删an涩~僧, i **** mi魔蓹师a mi师o~umo~u涩~僧 i paj删蓹nkaj itija, i **** mi魔蓹师a mapatir蓹艐 ma删asimpo~u~u. i **** mi魔蓹师a, 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u a师i miaw kan师蓹艐 simpo~u~u (ao~u~uf 涩~僧蓹r mao~u~ur 魔ansj*r*) nai mars蓹i删删蓹 minato~u mika删i师 to~u tamina ta艐asa i ki删o~u艐 minato~u, ta tajra i po~uso~u艐 misinti艐. 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u tajra i kakawasan pat蓹nak, minanam to~u nai kiki魔ar mipat蓹nakaj 师i po~u pisin simpo~u~u (a删io~us b~b~vo~u~urk蓹, smb~b~v) to~u no~u kapi艐 a so~uwa删. iko~ur, mao~u师o~ur 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u tajra i nijaro~u省 no~u fa删a艐aw. kaitiraan ni艐ra i, misa省i师蓹删 to~u no~u nijaro~u省aj pipat蓹nak, saan mipatir蓹艐 to~u no~u pajra艐 a so~uwa删 ko~u pinanam to~u fa艐师a删aj 师o~u~u涩~僧a涩~僧, mirina省 to~u no~u pajra艐 a so~uwa删 to~u "sapi删i删i师 ato~u 师a省o~uf", "pa省a删iwa师an sasa省o~usi蓹n ti删i涩~僧" a ti删i涩~僧an . i **** mi魔蓹师a, jiso~ukaj mapi删i省 师i 涩~僧o~u~u 魔o~u~ua simpo~u~u patajra i b~b~va艐ko~uk, t魔ai删an涩~僧 minanam to~u no~u ko~u师iwsja sapipatir蓹艐, nano~ujaan ma涩~僧a涩~僧o~u蓹涩~僧o~u ito~u ko~u tajwan mipatir蓹艐 to~u ko~u师iwsja . 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u misa省i师蓹删 to~u pipatir蓹艐 to~u ko~u师iwsja a o~unto~u, i **** mi魔蓹师a patir蓹艐 to~u kisan ko~u师iwsja . nano~ujaan minanam to~u ko~u jin师o~u~umin a mina省a艐 to~u pajso~u, ma师akat mafa删i师 ko~u ki师aj, a 师aaj to~u pata艐i师 mipa省a师a to~u wawa to~u fafa魔ijan . i **** mi魔蓹师a ** fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, paj删蓹nkiwkaj itira i piti删i涩~僧an no~u po~uso~u艐 mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u ** mi魔蓹师aan, ira ko~u si蓹n师a艐 师i xo~u~u *i艐jo~u~uan maki删a师 to~u patamo~u魔o~u艐 艐a省ajaj finaw删an no~u po~uso~u艐 师i wij 师o~u~uan, wo~u~u ro~u~uo~usi, k蓹 涩~僧蓹, jo~u~u 魔o~u~ui删in, 删i 魔o~u~uair蓹n, *o~u~ust a 蓹n蓹maj simpo~u~u ato~u 师i o~uo~u~u si涩~僧i艐, fo~u~u ji, sij 魔o~u艐涩~僧ao~u, 删in siro~uo~u~u sas蓹pataj siwsi . to~uja mi魔蓹师aan ta艐asa **** mi魔蓹师aan, 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u to~uno~u mato~uro~u省 no~u so~ukaj no~u swit*蓹r删an涩~僧 paj删蓹nkaj fafa省蓹涩~僧aj pikajkian ato~u swit*蓹r删an涩~僧 sa省蓹ta删 kak蓹ri涩~僧an, o~urasaka i **** mi魔蓹师a 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u tajra i swit*蓹r删an涩~僧, 魔a删afinaj ro~umi省a涩~僧 itini i tajwan . o~u sapi删o~u艐o~u师 mino~ukaj tajni tajwan ni wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u, ira ko~u mata省蓹删ifaj to~u *** sa删akaka pa艐a艐an patajra to~u ti删i涩~僧 i swit*蓹r删an涩~僧, o~urasaka i **** mi魔蓹师a ma删蓹po~un ko~u 删蓹ka涩~僧an no~u ka删a fafa省蓹涩~僧aj pikajkian ni wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u . i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, o~u kak蓹ri涩~僧an no~u s蓹n师蓹fo~u no~u tajwan 师i 删in *魔蓹艐*蓹 tajra sa i po~uso~u艐 pakao~u删a魔 pako~umpaj ** tam涩~僧aw ta涩~僧amaanaj tam涩~僧aw, o~u sakakaaj to~u ** ko~u mi魔蓹师a ni wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u . 省ajaw i **** mi魔蓹师aan itija, 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u itira i 删o~uto~u艐 s蓹nmo~u isi艐an makinsa ni fan f蓹艐删o~u艐 isi艐 师i a涩~僧a涩~僧a to~u ka魔蓹ti艐aj tatii魔aj piras. i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧, 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u ma删a删ijaw 魔a师a ma删ina魔 tajra tajra i fa删a省 ko~u a涩~僧a涩~僧a, iko~ur o~uja misawa涩~僧aj a 省aisi涩~僧an 师i *魔a艐 *iaxio~u艐 ko~u marari涩~僧aj mipati魔i patajra i 魔蓹 xin isi艐an no~u tajpi a paisi艐. itija i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 * ro~umi省a涩~僧 mapato~u涩~僧o~u艐 no~u sakakaaj mi涩~僧蓹makaj to~u 删a删o~uma省an (ni师蓹npo~u) to~u kai艐a艐an. i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, iko~ur no~u pipakinsi i 魔蓹 xin isi艐an, o~u pa删i涩~僧i艐 to~u ko~u sakaro~umakat ni wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u, sano~uja sato~u pa魔蓹r蓹k ko~u taja删 ni艐ra i kiwkaj. itija i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 魔蓹r蓹k no~u 删a魔o~uk * ko~u wi涩~僧i, itira i kamaro~u省an no~u paj删蓹nwajfan sinkiwkaj siwkaj a mi删ijas to~u 魔蓹ka删 a mapataj, mata涩~僧蓹m itira i tinso~ukiw no~u piw魔o~u a pita涩~僧蓹man mata涩~僧蓹m . tan蓹艐n蓹艐an *. ).
S.FORM: == Wiy Cuan Simpo == Wiy Cuan , Paylenwayfan Sinkiwkay Simpu, mararid ko pisinting i Falangaw no Posong. Kasofoc Wiy Cuan Simpu, I 1931 miheca 6 folad 26 romi'ad masofoc i Switzerland, i 1925 miheca micomod i Paylenkay itiya, i 1958 miheca mapatireng malaSimpu. I 1963 miheca, ci Wiy Cuan Simpu aci Miaw Kanceng Simpu (Auf der Maur Hansj枚rg) nai Marseille minato mikalic to tamina tangasa i Kilong minato, ta tayra i Posong misinting. Ci Wiy Cuan Simpu tayra i Kakawasan patenak, minanam to nai Kikihar mipatenakay ci Po Pisin Simpu (Alios Burke, SMB) to no Kaping a sowal. Ikor, maocor ci Wiy Cuan Simpu tayra i niyaro' no Falangaw. Kaitiraan ningra i, misa'icel to no niyaro'ay pipatenak, saan mipatireng to no Payrang a sowal ko pinanam to Fangcalay cudad, mirina' to no Payrang a sowal to "sapililic ato ca'of", "pa'aliwacan sasa'osien tilid" a tilidan . I 1965 miheca, Yisokay mapili' ci Du Hua Simpu patayra i Bangkok, Thailand minanam to no Kociwsya sapipatireng, nanoyaan madadoedo ito ko Taywan mipatireng to Kociwsya . Ci Wiy Cuan Simpu misa'icel to pipatireng to Kociwsya a onto, i 1987 miheca patireng to Kisan Kociwsya . Nanoyaan minanam to ko yincumin a mina'ang to payso, macakat mafalic ko kicay, a caay to patangic mipa'aca to wawa to fafahiyan . I 2003 miheca 10 folad 18 romi'ad, Paylenkiwkay itira i pitilidan no Posong midemak to 50 mihecaan, ira ko Siencang ci Xu Qingyuan makilac to patamohong nga'ayay finawlan no Posong ci Wiy Cuan, Wu Ruosi, Ke De, Yu Huilin, Li Huairen, Just a enemay Simpu ato ci Ou Siding, Fu Yi, Siy Hongdao, Lin Sirou sasepatay Siwsi . Toya mihecaan tangasa 2008 mihecaan, ci Wiy Cuan Simpu tono matoro' no Sokay no Switzerland Paylenkay Fafa'eday pikaykian ato Switzerland sa'etal kakeridan, orasaka i 2008 miheca ci Wiy Cuan Simpu tayra i Switzerland, halafinay romi'ad itini i Taywan . O sapilongoc minokay tayni Taywan ni Wiy Cuan Simpu, ira ko mata'elifay to 600 salakaka pangangan patayra to tilid i Switzerland, orasaka i 2008 miheca malepon ko lekadan no kala Fafa'eday pikaykian ni Wiy Cuan Simpu . I 2015 miheca 5 folad 11 romi'ad, o kakeridan no Sencefo no Taywan ci Lin Zhengze tayra sa i Posong pakaolah pakompay 13 tamdaw tadamaanay tamdaw, o sakakaay to 84 ko miheca ni Wiy Cuan Simpu . 'Ayaw i 1979 mihecaan itiya, ci Wiy Cuan Simpu itira i Lotong Senmo isingan makinsa ni Fan Fenglong ising ci adada to kahetingay tatiihay piras. I 2015 miheca 8 folad, ci Wiy Cuan Simpu malaliyaw haca malinah tayra tayra i fala' ko adada, ikor oya misawaday a 'aisidan ci Zhang Jiaxiong ko marariday mipatihi patayra i He Xin isingan no Taypi a paising. Itiya i 2017 miheca 8 folad 3 romi'ad mapatodong no Sakakaay midemakay to laloma'an (Nicenpo) to kaingangan. I 2020 miheca 3 folad 16 romi'ad, ikor no pipakinsi i He Xin isingan, o paliding to ko sakaromakat ni Wiy Cuan Simpu, sanoya sato paherek ko tayal ningra i kiwkay. Itiya i 2022 miheca 2 folad 13 romi'ad herek no lahok 1 ko widi, itira i kamaro'an no Paylenwayfan Sinkiwkay siwkay a miliyas to hekal a mapatay, matadem itira i Tinsokiw no Piwho a pitademan matadem . Tanengnengan 2. ).
S.PHON: == wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u == wij 师o~u~uan , paj删蓹nwajfan sinkiwkaj simpo~u~u, marari涩~僧 ko~u pisinti艐 i fa删a艐aw no~u po~uso~u艐. kaso~ufo~u师 wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u, i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 maso~ufo~u师 i swit*蓹r删an涩~僧, i **** mi魔蓹师a mi师o~umo~u涩~僧 i paj删蓹nkaj itija, i **** mi魔蓹师a mapatir蓹艐 ma删asimpo~u~u. i **** mi魔蓹师a, 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u a师i miaw kan师蓹艐 simpo~u~u (ao~u~uf 涩~僧蓹r mao~u~ur 魔ansj*r*) nai mars蓹i删删蓹 minato~u mika删i师 to~u tamina ta艐asa i ki删o~u艐 minato~u, ta tajra i po~uso~u艐 misinti艐. 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u tajra i kakawasan pat蓹nak, minanam to~u nai kiki魔ar mipat蓹nakaj 师i po~u pisin simpo~u~u (a删io~us b~b~vo~u~urk蓹, smb~b~v) to~u no~u kapi艐 a so~uwa删. iko~ur, mao~u师o~ur 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u tajra i nijaro~u省 no~u fa删a艐aw. kaitiraan ni艐ra i, misa省i师蓹删 to~u no~u nijaro~u省aj pipat蓹nak, saan mipatir蓹艐 to~u no~u pajra艐 a so~uwa删 ko~u pinanam to~u fa艐师a删aj 师o~u~u涩~僧a涩~僧, mirina省 to~u no~u pajra艐 a so~uwa删 to~u "sapi删i删i师 ato~u 师a省o~uf", nano~ujaan minanam to~u ko~u jin师o~u~umin a mina省a艐 to~u pajso~u, ma师akat mafa删i师 ko~u ki师aj, a 师aaj to~u pata艐i师 mipa省a师a to~u wawa to~u fafa魔ijan . i **** mi魔蓹师a ** fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, paj删蓹nkiwkaj itira i piti删i涩~僧an no~u po~uso~u艐 mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u ** mi魔蓹师aan, ira ko~u si蓹n师a艐 师i xo~u~u *i艐jo~u~uan maki删a师 to~u patamo~u魔o~u艐 艐a省ajaj finaw删an no~u po~uso~u艐 师i wij 师o~u~uan, wo~u~u ro~u~uo~usi, k蓹 涩~僧蓹, jo~u~u 魔o~u~ui删in, 删i 魔o~u~uair蓹n, *o~u~ust a 蓹n蓹maj simpo~u~u ato~u 师i o~uo~u~u si涩~僧i艐, fo~u~u ji, sij 魔o~u艐涩~僧ao~u, 删in siro~uo~u~u sas蓹pataj siwsi . to~uja mi魔蓹师aan ta艐asa kak蓹ri涩~僧an no~u s蓹n师蓹fo~u no~u tajwan 师i 删in *魔蓹艐*蓹 tajra sa i po~uso~u艐 pakao~u删a魔 pako~umpaj ** tam涩~僧aw ta涩~僧amaanaj tam涩~僧aw, o~u sakakaaj to~u ** ko~u mi魔蓹师a ni wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u . 省ajaw i **** mi魔蓹师aan itija, 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u itira i 删o~uto~u艐 s蓹nmo~u isi艐an makinsa ni fan f蓹艐删o~u艐 isi艐 师i a涩~僧a涩~僧a to~u ka魔蓹ti艐aj tatii魔aj piras. i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧, 师i wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u ma删a删ijaw 魔a师a ma删ina魔 tajra tajra i fa删a省 ko~u a涩~僧a涩~僧a, iko~ur o~uja misawa涩~僧aj a 省aisi涩~僧an 师i *魔a艐 *iaxio~u艐 ko~u marari涩~僧aj mipati魔i patajra i 魔蓹 xin isi艐an no~u tajpi a paisi艐. itija i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 * ro~umi省a涩~僧 mapato~u涩~僧o~u艐 no~u sakakaaj mi涩~僧蓹makaj to~u 删a删o~uma省an (ni师蓹npo~u) to~u kai艐a艐an. i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, iko~ur no~u pipakinsi i 魔蓹 xin isi艐an, o~u pa删i涩~僧i艐 to~u ko~u sakaro~umakat ni wij 师o~u~uan simpo~u~u, sano~uja sato~u pa魔蓹r蓹k ko~u taja删 ni艐ra i kiwkaj. itija i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 魔蓹r蓹k no~u 删a魔o~uk * ko~u wi涩~僧i, itira i kamaro~u省an no~u paj删蓹nwajfan sinkiwkaj siwkaj a mi删ijas to~u 魔蓹ka删 a mapataj, mata涩~僧蓹m itira i tinso~ukiw no~u piw魔o~u a pita涩~僧蓹man mata涩~僧蓹m . tan蓹艐n蓹艐an *. ).
